title: Welcome to AionUi

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.description: AionUi is your local, open-source AI assistant. Chat with AI agents, manage files, and automate tasks—all while keeping your data private.

step2.title: Choose Your Agent
step2.description: Connect to Gemini CLI, AionRS, or custom agents. Select different AI models and assistants for different tasks. Your AI, your choice.

step3.title: Start Chatting
step3.description: Upload files, open folders, or just start typing. AionUi supports multi-turn conversations, file previews, and real-time collaboration.

step4.title: You're All Set!
step4.description: Need help? Click the feedback button anytime. Enjoy your AI-powered workflow with AionUi!

finishAriaLabel: Complete onboarding and start using AionUi
